Let's begin our regular meeting. First, let me check on last week's progress.
Yes. Development of the speech recognition module is proceeding on schedule. Test results have also been good.
That's wonderful. How is the accuracy of the real-time translation feature?
Currently, the translation accuracy from Japanese to English is approximately ninety percent. Translation to Chinese is eighty-five percent.
There is still room for improvement. Could you put together a plan to improve the accuracy by next week?
Of course. I think we can expect accuracy improvements by expanding the context window.
